title: Tragacantha bludhistana

Tragacanth is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the legume family, known for its thick, gel-like sap. The health benefits of Tragacanth include its potential in reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Its bioactive constituents include mucilage, triterpene saponins, and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Tragacanth include powders, extracts, and ointments, which are often used to treat digestive issues and skin irritations.
